notice: MOCKED API RESPONSE SHAPED AFTER REAL SOURCES. Production source: GitHub Search API, Papers With Code linked repositories, arXiv/publisher links, and repository README files.
source_origin: GitHub Search/Papers With Code shaped snapshot

official_repository.notes: No repository owned by the paper authors was found in the mocked search results.

search_results.readme_excerpt: Unofficial reimplementation of SparseCheck. Preprocessing requires scripts/private_preprocess.py, which is not included because the benchmark holdout annotations are gated. Default training uses: torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 train.py --config configs/sparsecheck_a100.yaml.
search_results.metric_implementation: evaluate.py reports micro_f1 by default; macro_f1 is present behind --average macro but not used by the README command.

search_results.readme_excerpt: Baseline retrieval recipes for SciQA-LongTail. Does not include SparseCheck calibration head.
search_results.metric_implementation: macro_f1 and micro_f1 both available for baselines.

direct_conflicts.paper_claim: Official implementation is available and includes preprocessing.
direct_conflicts.artifact_evidence: Claimed official repository returns 404; unofficial repo misses scripts/private_preprocess.py.
Only discovered training command uses torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 with an A100 config.
